superApp.name: Flion Agentic Super App
superApp.tagline: A sanitized public workspace for agents, plugins, skills, memory, browser sessions, and release gates.
superApp.summary: Flion is presented here as a public, sanitized agent workspace. The private runtime has more local state, credentials, logs, and project memory; this demo keeps the product shape while exposing only synthetic data and reviewable code.
superApp.safetyBoundary: No private vault data, credentials, local sessions, client logs, or unverifiable internal-platform claims are included.

stats.label: Native plugins
stats.detail: Connector-style integrations surfaced through the UI.

stats.label: Skills indexed
stats.detail: Reusable operating playbooks selectable from the composer.

stats.label: Role agents
stats.detail: Specialized agents for scope, design, architecture, build, QA, and release.

stats.label: Release gates
stats.detail: Evidence-backed stages before a handoff is marked ready.

modules.title: Agent Chat Command Center
modules.description: Composer-driven chat with model controls, access policy, context chips, and active plugin or skill mentions.

modules.title: Plugin And Skill Registry
modules.description: A searchable runtime catalog that separates available, needs configuration, needs permission, and unavailable capabilities.

modules.title: Agent Flow Canvas
modules.description: Visual pipeline for role agents, work items, blocked states, QA loops, and release ownership.

modules.title: Memory Vault Graph
modules.description: Operational memory map that rehydrates context from notes, workstreams, and linked decisions without exposing private content.

modules.title: Browser And Computer Dock
modules.description: Per-session browser and computer surfaces with approval policies, previews, logs, references, and action history.

modules.title: Automation Scheduler
modules.description: Recurring agent runs with model selection, schedules, stale-run repair, and post-run summaries.

modules.title: Connector Authority
modules.description: OAuth, connector requirements, permission grants, and capability routing are explicit runtime objects.

modules.title: Release Desk
modules.description: Evidence, tests, residual risks, and deployment notes are packaged before public handoff.

triggers.title: Reference plugins, skills, and files
triggers.description: The composer opens a searchable palette for plugins, skills, and context files, then renders selected items as inline chips.

triggers.title: Run commands and change operating mode
triggers.description: Slash commands expose actions like compact, fork, create task, create note, change model, and switch personality.

triggers.title: Open creation and attachment actions
triggers.description: The plus menu groups new tasks, notes, files, plugin shortcuts, and session actions without crowding the composer.

agents.title: Jarvis Main
agents.mission: Keeps the main thread coherent, chooses the next action, and manages active context.

agents.title: Opportunity Operator
agents.mission: Turns external opportunities into structured applications, blockers, and follow-up loops.

agents.title: Scope Producer
agents.mission: Converts ambiguous requests into acceptance criteria, constraints, and product intent.

agents.title: Solution Designer
agents.mission: Shapes UX, flows, and interaction contracts before engineering starts.

agents.title: Technical Architect
agents.mission: Maps modules, data contracts, tool boundaries, and runtime risks.

agents.title: Execution Engineer
agents.mission: Builds the agreed slice, keeps diffs focused, and preserves public/private boundaries.

agents.title: Quality Guardian
agents.mission: Runs tests, smoke checks, accessibility scans, and evidence validation before release.

agents.title: Release Manager
agents.mission: Packages what changed, what passed, residual risks, and deployment status.

dock.title: Preview
dock.description: Live browser or static preview tied to the active session.

dock.title: Logs
dock.description: Runtime events, tool calls, internal cards, and safety warnings.

dock.title: Execution
dock.description: Agent actions, approvals, browser steps, and automation runs.

dock.title: Files
dock.description: Context files selected for the current thread or workstream.

dock.title: Details
dock.description: Session state, model, access mode, and handoff metadata.

automations.title: QA Smoke Runner
automations.outcome: Runs validation, collects screenshots, and writes release notes.

automations.title: Portfolio Publisher
automations.outcome: Refreshes public copy, screenshots, and deployment checks.

automations.title: Opportunity Scanner
automations.outcome: Finds one high-fit opportunity, rejects weak matches, and records blockers.

dataCloud.title: Data Cloud Agents Module
dataCloud.description: The runnable vertical slice in this repository still proves tool-mediated data work with contracts, safe SQL, workers, QA, and release evidence.

dataset.title: Sanitized Revenue Cloud
dataset.description: Small public fixture for agentic data workflow demonstrations.

tables.name: accounts
tables.description: Sanitized account-level revenue and workflow status.

tables.name: tool_runs
tables.description: Sanitized tool execution summary for agent workflow observability.

tools.name: validate_sql
tools.description: Validate a read-only SQL query against the public dataset contract.

tools.name: query_dataset
tools.description: Run a safe SELECT query against the in-memory public demo dataset.

tools.name: semantic_search
tools.description: Search sanitized dataset and architecture notes with lexical retrieval.

tools.name: generate_sample_code
tools.description: Generate deterministic sample client code for a safe tool call.

tools.name: record_evidence
tools.description: Wrap stage evidence in a deterministic envelope before it enters the pipeline.

agents.title: Scope Agent
agents.mission: Bounds the request to public data and acceptance criteria.

agents.title: Architecture Agent
agents.mission: Turns workflow decisions into contracts, tools, workers, and evaluation gates.

agents.title: Toolsmith Agent
agents.mission: Executes validated MCP-style tools and records deterministic artifacts.

agents.title: QA Gate Agent
agents.mission: Blocks self-approval by checking SQL, query rows, code generation, and worker execution.

agents.title: Release Agent
agents.mission: Packages evidence, limitations, and public positioning into a reviewable handoff.

superAppModules.title: Mission Home
superAppModules.description: Single cockpit for active work, evidence health, agent state, and release readiness.

superAppModules.title: Agent Workspace
superAppModules.description: Role-based agents move the same work item through scope, solution, architecture, QA, and release.

superAppModules.title: Tool Registry
superAppModules.description: MCP-style tools expose safe data operations instead of letting agents improvise against raw systems.

superAppModules.title: Data Contracts
superAppModules.description: Dataset schemas, query limits, and result envelopes are visible before release is allowed.

superAppModules.title: Release Center
superAppModules.description: Evaluation gates package evidence, residual risks, and final handoff state.

releaseNote.summary: Flion Super App demo completed with public data, safe tools, worker validation, and release evidence.
residualRisks: This is an in-memory demo; production deployment would need persistent queues and auth.
The SQL validator intentionally supports a small safe subset.
The visible console is sanitized and does not expose private Flion runtime state.

implementation.sql: SELECT account, arr_usd, risk FROM accounts LIMIT 3

positioning.safe: Public sanitized agentic super-app sample with plugins, skills, explicit permissions, typed contracts, MCP-style tools, async validation, evaluation gates, and release evidence.
positioning.boundary: This does not expose the private Flion runtime, local vault, credentials, sessions, logs, or unverifiable internal-platform experience.
